zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Fraser於1208年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖時，他的父親Sir Bernard Fraser44歲，母親Mary Ogilvie36歲。他於大約1222年與Christian Lascelles在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年1月7日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Fraser于1208年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾圖时，他的父亲Sir Bernard Fraser44岁，母亲Mary Ogilvie36岁。他于大约1222年与Christian Lascelles在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年1月7日在苏格兰斯林史爾圖享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Fraser was born in 1208, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Bernard Fraser, was 44 and his mother, Mary Ogilvie, was 36. He married Christian Lascelles about 1222, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 January 1263, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Fraser est né en 1208, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Bernard Fraser, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mary Ogilvie, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Christian Lascelles environ 1222, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1263, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Fraser 1208 in Touch, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Bernard Fraser 44 und seine Mutter Mary Ogilvie 36. Er hat um 1222 in Scotland Christian Lascelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1263 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Fraser è nato il nel 1208 nel Touch, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Bernard Fraser, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mary Ogilvie, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Christian Lascelles circa 1222, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1263, nel Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Fraserが1208年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチで生まれた時，父Sir Bernard Fraserは44歳，母Mary Ogilvieは36歳であった。約1222年にスコットランドでChristian Lascellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年1月7日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチで55歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Fraser(이)가 1208년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Bernard Fraser(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ogilvie(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1222년 스컷랜드에서 Christian Lascelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 1월 7일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Touch-Fraser, Stirlingshire, Scotland: Touch, Striviling, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Fraser nasceu em 1208, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Bernard Fraser, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ogilvie, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Lascelles aproximadamente 1222, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1263, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Fraser родился в 1208 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Bernard Fraser было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Ogilvie, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Lascelles около 1222 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 января 1263 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Fraser nació en 1208, en Touch, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Bernard Fraser, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mary Ogilvie, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Christian Lascelles aproximadamente 1222, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1263, en Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Stirlingshire, Scotland.
